productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Yellow Flip Flops
description: Style Note These comfortable and cool yellow numero uno flip flops with bold green lettering along the centre are a perfect way to give the cool edge to casual dressing. Wear these with your jeans or any other casuals and take a bit of summer cool with you wherever you go. Product Details Yellow flip flop with rubber thong straps and rubber toe separator Soft footbed Rigid rubber outsole Material and Care Rubber Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
